shell.title: Craft a stack of Cannon Shells (Create Big Cannons — standard ballistic ammo)

incendiary.title: Craft Incendiary Shot (CBC — fire-damage variant, useful against Nether mobs)

subtitle.text: Create Big Cannons has 12 ammo types. Know them before you build the gun.

description: CH.07 · THE ARMORY
▸ Create Big Cannons adds functional siege weapons.
Mechanical assembly. Real ballistics.
The ammo type determines what you destroy.
◈ CBC AMMO TYPES
└ Cannon Shell: standard explosive, anti-structure
└ Incendiary Shell: fire damage + block ignite
best against mobs, slow against stone
└ Shrapnel Shot: area damage, anti-mob cluster
└ Armor Piercing: high penetration, less AoE
best against heavily armored bosses
└ Grape Shot: shotgun spread, close-range defense
└ Nuclear Shell (Ch10): creates nuke strike zone
(Create Nuclear Shell + Create Oppenheimered)
◈ CANNON DESIGN
└ Cannon Barrel: assembled from CBC Barrel blocks
└ Firing Mechanism: Redstone or Create rotational
└ Loading: automated via Deployer into breech
└ Elevation: adjustable with Create bearing
└ Range: depends on barrel length and charge
▸ The armory scroll was found beside a cannon
that had been fired once.
At something.
The something was not there anymore.
▶ Craft a stack of Cannon Shells [check]
▶ Craft Incendiary Shot [check]
◇ Nuclear Shell (Ch10) requires Create Teleporters
quantum_mechanism chain to unlock.
Plan that infrastructure now.
The cannon is already built.
